522 PRNTRL_ADMSN_CD PRNTRL_ADMSN_CD Nutritional Approaches (Admission): Parenteral CHAR 1 This column documents whether the patient was receiving Parenteral/IV feeding as their nutritional approach at the time of admission. 0 = No
